config.note: HAL answers from the local registry first. Only unmatched questions go to the local 14B chat lane on 127.0.0.1. The external-action firewall runs before the model, so submit/email/upload/writeback never reach it. The model is read-only: it drafts text only and takes no actions.

lanes.name: 14B chat lane
willAllow: Answer general staff questions about the program

lanes.name: 21B reasoning lane
lanes.role: Program review, prioritization, and structured reasoning

lanes.name: 30B escalation lane
lanes.role: Second-opinion review for complex or high-risk questions
